title: India Expresses Concern Over Firing on Indian Ships in Hormuz; Steps Up Efforts for Safe Passage & Evacuation of Nationals
description: MEA Spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal stated that India is in touch with Iran to secure a safe exit for its ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Ministry of Shipping Director Mandeep Randhawa noted that the government has facilitated the safe repatriation of over 2,563 Indian seafarers so far.
